author: y4rr
content: Landed in cf6047b1b (release 0.5.6). CPU VaeEncoder<T> + Encoder<T> + DiagonalGaussianDistribution<T> + DownEncoderBlock2D + load_vae_encoder, 16 new lib tests, conformance scaffolding for the future HF mirror, Python ref script. cargo test -p ferrotorch-diffusion --lib: 79 passed (was 63). Unblocks molten#639 tile_upscale.
